privacy_note: cloud-centric baseline: no fog processing, no aggregation privacy, stores raw readings
conventional fog aggregation lower bound: one plaintext sum, fog sees raw readings

P2-SWAN-style Paillier baseline: fog converts AES to Paillier and accumulates; stores 1 aggregate ciphertext (same byte cost as ours). Distinguishing factors vs ours: no TEE delegation overhead, no KMM cross-fog key isolation.
TEE AES-to-Paillier conversion with Paillier slot aggregation; delegation overhead only on delegated windows
